Container.Name: TorrentBridge
Container.Overview: TorrentBridge automates two-stage torrent seeding: downloads complete fast on Unraid (qBit-A), then TorrentBridge migrates the data and .torrent session to a Raspberry Pi (qBit-B) for long-term seeding. Integrates with Sonarr and Radarr to wait for import before migrating. Deletes from qBit-A only after Pi recheck confirms 100% data integrity.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: TorrentBridge web interface port

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Stores torrentbridge.json, SSH keys (/config/ssh/), and logs

Config.Name: qBit-A BT_backup Path
Config.Description: Mount your qBittorrent-A appdata BT_backup directory here (read-only)

Config.Name: qBit-A Host
Config.Description: qBittorrent-A hostname or IP (usually localhost or your Unraid IP)

Config.Name: qBit-A Port
Config.Description: qBittorrent-A WebUI port

Config.Name: qBit-A Username
Config.Description: qBittorrent-A WebUI username

Config.Name: qBit-A Password
Config.Description: qBittorrent-A WebUI password

Config.Name: Pi IP Address
Config.Description: Raspberry Pi IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.50)

Config.Name: qBit-B Port
Config.Description: qBittorrent-B WebUI port on Pi

Config.Name: Pi SSH User
Config.Description: SSH username for rsync to Pi

Config.Name: qBit-B Username
Config.Description: qBittorrent-B WebUI username on Pi

Config.Name: qBit-B Password
Config.Description: qBittorrent-B WebUI password on Pi

Config.Name: Pi Seed Root
Config.Description: Root path on Pi where seeded data will be stored

Config.Name: SSH Key Path
Config.Description: Path to SSH private key inside container. Generate with: ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -f /mnt/user/appdata/torrentbridge/ssh/id_migrate

Config.Name: Sonarr Host
Config.Description: Sonarr hostname or IP (leave blank to skip)

Config.Name: Poll Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to check qBit-A for completed downloads

Config.Name: Post-Download Delay (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds to wait after download completes before migrating (allow Arr apps to import)

Config.Name: Recheck Timeout (seconds)
Config.Description: Max seconds to wait for qBit-B to complete data recheck

Config.Name: Bandwidth Limit (KB/s)
Config.Description: rsync bandwidth cap in KB/s. 0 = unlimited

Config.Name: Watch Category
Config.Description: Only migrate torrents in this qBit-A category. Leave blank to migrate all completed.

Config.Name: Seed Category
Config.Description: Category to assign when adding torrents to qBit-B

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
